Author

- [ ] Did I do everything that the **original ticket** wanted?
  - [ ] If not, why? → document it or create a follow-up ticket
- [ ] Did I write tests? Is the test coverage stable?
- [ ] Did I document my changes at [Documentation: Associate](https://www.notion.so/Documentation-Associate-1b4bca09f49b8137b5f0e6b897b58af4?pvs=21)?
- [ ] (Only for visible features) Did I add a screenshot or video of me using the feature?
- [ ] Did I assign 2 other developers as reviewers?
  - [ ] Did I assign the github copilot? → Also follow its suggestions
- [ ] Did I add a _Time to completion_ to the ticket in notion?

Reviewer 1

- [ ] Is the PR complete? Does it do what the ticket wants it to do?
- [ ] Were tests written?
  - [ ] Did the test coverage remain stable / increase?
- [ ] (For features) was the thing documented at [Documentation: Associate](https://www.notion.so/Documentation-Associate-1b4bca09f49b8137b5f0e6b897b58af4?pvs=21)?

Reviewer 2

- [ ] Is the PR complete? Does it do what the ticket wants it to do?
- [ ] Were tests written?
  - [ ] Did the test coverage remain stable / increase?
- [ ] (For features) was the thing documented at [Documentation: Associate](https://www.notion.so/Documentation-Associate-1b4bca09f49b8137b5f0e6b897b58af4?pvs=21)?
